subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Khodabakhsh hath closed his eyes to this world and hastened unto Thy realm, that he may receive Thy bounty and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا خدابخش چشم از این جهان بربست و بجهان تو شتافت تا بخشش یابد و در
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @eulogies; reminiscences, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
